response_constraints: Answer only from successfully fetched content; search snippets are not evidence.

State the requested fact directly and keep any inference separate from sourced facts.

prompt: As of 15 March 2026, identify the organization behind the Open Pages Literacy Coalition in Northbridge, then fetch a dated official leadership record to verify its executive director. Ignore undated biographies and similarly named groups in other places. If locality and subject type do not resolve a single organization, ask me which one; if they do, continue without asking.

fetch_primary.title: Open Pages Northbridge leadership roster
fetch_primary.content: The leadership roster, revised 12 February 2026, lists Inez Calder as executive director, effective 1 November 2025. The roster supersedes the 2024 staff brochure.
